title: Sinister Plugin Manifest
description: Shared plugin-manifest schema consumable by Sinister Term, Sinister Memory, and any other lane that wants to load community/cross-lane plugins. Modeled on oh-my-pi packages/coding-agent/src/extensibility/plugins/types.ts:27-95. Validator: D:/Sinister Sanctum/automations/plugin_manifest.py. Author: RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-26.

name.description: Plugin slug. kebab-case, 2-64 chars, must start with a lowercase letter.

author.description: Author handle. RKOJ-ELENO is canonical for in-fleet plugins.

lanes.description: Sinister lanes the plugin targets. Use 'all' as a wildcard.

entry_points.description: Where the host should load plugin code from.

commands.description: Relative paths to Python files exposing slash-command implementations.

hooks.description: Map of hook-name -> relative python path (e.g. pre_turn, post_turn).

extensions.description: Relative paths to generic extension modules.

settings_schema.description: Map of setting_name -> setting descriptor. Validator enforces enum_values when type=enum.

features.description: Map of feature_flag_name -> {default: bool, description?: string}.

python.description: Map of pip package -> version range string (e.g. '>=2.0,<3').

node.description: Map of npm package -> version range string.

requires_lanes.description: Lane slugs that MUST exist for this plugin to load.
